No Code
Data Visualization

“It is a truth universally acknowledged, that a Srishti Art and Design student, in possession of a good Mac, must be terrified of coding.”

— Code and Prejudice · Jane Austen · 1813

A complete course in data storytelling, visualization, and analysis — using only point-and-click tools. No code. No intimidation. Just insight.

Start the Course → Learn More

Curated Resources
What is this?

Data Science for Curious Minds
— No Code Required

This course takes art and design students on a journey through data — exploring, visualizing, questioning, and storytelling — using only free, visual, drag-and-drop tools.

🎨

Designed for Designers

Built for students at Srishti who think visually. Data becomes a design material — something to sketch with, arrange, and make beautiful.

📊

Real Data, Real Stories

From Olympic swimming results to life expectancy trends — every module uses authentic datasets drawn from human experience.

🔬

From Charts to Inference

Go beyond making pretty pictures. Learn to ask sharp questions, spot patterns, and test whether your insights actually matter — statistically.

The Curriculum

The Recipe

Great data analysis is like good cooking. We follow a recipe — from sourcing raw ingredients to serving a finished dish.

1

🛒 Get the Ingredients Together

Learn to shop for data. Appreciate how it was gathered, what it looks like, and how to spot a good variable.

2

🔪 Wash, Clean, Peel, Grate, Fry

Rapidly create different kinds of charts and tables. Experiment with colour, size, and filtering.

3

🍴 Sample and Taste

Ask questions of your chart. Does it need more salt? Try to answer with graphs, tables, or plain numbers.

4

✨ The Element of Surprise

Use your sense of surprise. Develop the intuition that matches data types to the right visual form.

5

🧪 Does it Matter?

How significant is your insight? Learn when a pattern is real and when it’s just noise in the data.

6

🍽️ Lay the Table

Tell the story. Annotate graphs with text and insight. Export clean, shareable documents. Decide what to do next.

7

🔁 Replicate and Reproduce

The best analysts are systematic. Learn to document your process and run the same recipe on new data.

What you’ll explore

Module Highlights

Each module dives into a specific type of data or visual story. Browse the full listing or jump into any topic that sparks your curiosity.

🗂️
Foundations

The Nature of Data

Variables, types, and the science of surprise. What does data actually look like?

📊
Categorical

Counts & Bar Charts

Visualizing single qualitative variables. Happy families are all alike.

📏
Quantities

Quantities

When data is numeric — histograms, dot plots, and distribution shapes.

🔮
Comparisons

Groups & Comparisons

Side-by-side comparisons across categories and dimensions.

🥧
Parts & Wholes

Proportions

Pies, donuts, treemaps — when the part-to-whole relationship is the story.

🗺️
Space

Maps & Space

Choropleths, cartograms, and geocoding. Where does your data live?

⏱️
Time

Change Over Time

Line charts, slope graphs, and bump charts for temporal stories.

🕸️
Relationships

Networks

Nodes, edges, and connections. Who is linked to whom, and how?

View All Modules →

Zero Coding. Zero Barriers.

The Toolkit

Every tool in this course is free, runs in a browser or on your laptop, and requires no programming whatsoever.

🍊

Orange Data Mining

Point-and-click data science from simple charts all the way to machine learning.

📐

RAWGraphs

Browser-based. No login. Beautiful unusual charts in minutes.

✍️

Datawrapper

Publication-quality charts and maps. Used by major newsrooms worldwide.

🌸

Flourish Studio

Stunning animated data stories and scrollytelling with zero code.

🔭

Observable Plot

Explore and share data in the browser. A no-code mode available too.

Ready to Tell Your Data Story?

Join students at Srishti Manipal Institute in discovering how data can surprise, persuade, and inspire — no code required.

Begin Module 1 →
